attributes.content:
## Overview

The Job Description card gives the workspace a structured home for role specification with title, department, responsibilities, requirements, and compensation range.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Job Description acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Contact]]** -- Job Description often needs a person-level reference for ownership, communication, or accountability.
- **[[Organization]]** -- Job Description frequently sits inside an account, company, or team-level relationship context.
- **[[Task]]** -- Job Description often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Job Description can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Document]]** -- Job Description can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Interview Feedback]]** -- Interview Feedback can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Job Description.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Job Description as the structured home for role specification with title, department, responsibilities, requirements, and compensation range and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Job Description when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Job Description stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.summary: Role specification with title, department, responsibilities, requirements, and compensation range.
